Container.Name: frigate-alpr-bridge
Container.Overview: Bridges Frigate license plate recognition events to the ALPR-Database HTTP API. Subscribes to the Frigate MQTT topic, debounces updates per event, fetches snapshot and bbox from the Frigate REST API, and POSTs a Blue Iris / CodeProject AI compatible payload to ALPR-Database.
Container.Description: Bridges Frigate license plate recognition events to the ALPR-Database HTTP API. Subscribes to the Frigate MQTT topic, debounces updates per event, fetches snapshot and bbox from the Frigate REST API, and POSTs a Blue Iris / CodeProject AI compatible payload to ALPR-Database.

Config.Name: MQTT host
Config.Description: Hostname or IP of the MQTT broker Frigate publishes to.

Config.Name: MQTT topic
Config.Description: Frigate MQTT topic for tracked object updates. Change only if you set a non-default topic_prefix in Frigate.

Config.Name: Frigate URL
Config.Description: Base URL of the Frigate REST API, e.g. http://192.168.1.50:5000

Config.Name: ALPR-Database URL
Config.Description: Full URL of the ALPR-Database plate-reads endpoint, e.g. http://192.168.1.60:3000/api/plate-reads

Config.Name: ALPR-Database API key
Config.Description: ALPR-Database API key (Settings -> Security in the ALPR-Database UI).

Config.Name: Debounce seconds
Config.Description: How long to wait after the last LPR update for an event before dispatching to ALPR-Database. Higher = more accurate final plate, more delay.

Config.Name: HTTP timeout
Config.Description: HTTP timeout in seconds for Frigate API and ALPR-Database calls.

Config.Name: HTTP retry attempts
Config.Description: Number of POST attempts to ALPR-Database before giving up.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone (affects timestamp formatting in outgoing payloads).
